extraction_reasoning: The risk section contains no litigation summary table; Risk Factor 40 states that there are currently no outstanding legal proceedings involving the Company, Promoters, Directors, Subsidiary and Group Companies, but this is not a category-count table and provides no quantified amount. Accordingly, no criminal, statutory/regulatory, or tax rows were counted, and no aggregate litigation amount was disclosed; contingent liabilities and a stated contingent-liabilities total, including a date, are also absent. The concentration disclosure is company-wide and uses revenue from operations: for the most recent full fiscal year, Fiscal 2021, top 10 Clients contributed 99.11% and top 5 customers contributed 85.98%; the six-month September 30, 2021 figures were not preferred because a full fiscal year is available. Monetary financial tables in the supplied section use ₹ million; no litigation or contingent-liability table unit is stated, so no conversion to crore was applicable.
